name: Brenus diligence module (BreAK CRC-001 / STC-1010)
what_it_solves: Hard-coded diligence guardrails + canon-frozen blocker registry for the Brenus BreAK CRC-001 program (anchor: STC-1010 haptenated whole-cell vaccine).
how_it_solves: Module holds: (1) canon-frozen blocker registry preventing silent rewrites of prior downgrades/quarantines, (2) hard-coded guardrails for BreAK CRC-001 protocol claims, (3) diligence checkpoints reconciled against the 8D remediation state and PATH A formula lock.
why_it_exists: CRISPRO_REPO_ARCHITECTURE_REPORT calls the diligence module 'the most important discovery' — it isolates the Brenus-specific rules from the general SL engine so protocol drift (mFOLFOX6 ± bevacizumab backbone, STC-1010 vaccine details) can't leak into other cases.

attributes.anchor_program: STC-1010 (haptenated whole-cell therapeutic vaccine, MSS CRC)
